deselect_reason: byte-equality test requires the archived v2.0.0 build environment; hosted CI deselects exactly this node id (policy D-V3-04)
note: Measured from a CLEAN CLONE of the tagged commit -- the authoritative figure, and what the published test-report asset contains. A full working copy reports more because five tests need optional untracked content (prompt packs, eye corpus, reference PDFs), each skipping 'expected on CI'. Counted with every gate PASSING: a run where the count guard itself fails reports one fewer, which is the trap this project has hit before -- fixing the count changes the count.
